---


## Changes Made:

1. **Updated `AudioTextRow` type** to include `s3Path: string | null` to store the S3 path from the presigned URL response.

2. **Updated `handleFileChange`** to:
   - Extract `s3_path` from the presigned URL API response
   - Store it in the row state along with the file
   - Clear `s3Path` when a file is removed

3. **Updated `handleEvaluate`** to:
   - Validate that all rows have `s3Path` set
   - Collect S3 paths from all rows
   - Map providers: if "whisper" is selected, send "groq" in the API request
   - Make a POST request to `${backendUrl}/stt/evaluate` with:
     - `audio_paths`: array of S3 paths
     - `texts`: array of reference transcriptions
     - `providers`: array of selected providers (with whisper → groq mapping)
     - `language`: selected language ("english" or "hindi")

4. **Updated validation** in `addRow` to also check for `s3Path`.

When "Evaluate" is clicked, it sends the evaluation request with the required data. The API response is logged to the console; you can add UI to display the results.

---


Added a button to select/deselect all providers.

1. **Added `toggleAllProviders` function** that:
   - Selects all providers if not all are selected
   - Deselects all if all are selected

2. **Added a button** next to the "Select providers to evaluate" heading that:
   - Shows "Select all" when not all providers are selected
   - Shows "Deselect all" when all providers are selected
   - Is positioned on the right side of the header row

The button uses the existing styling and updates based on the current selection state. Clicking it toggles all providers at once.

```diff
+               &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.348a1.125 1.125 0 010 1.971l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.667-.986V5.653z" /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             Evaluate
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         )}
        &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Results Tabs */}
+       {evaluationResult &amp;&amp; evaluationResult.status === "done" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="pt-6 space-y-4"&gt;
+           {/* Tab Navigation */}
+           &lt;div className="flex gap-2 border-b border-border"&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("leaderboard")}
+               className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors ${
+                 activeTab === "leaderboard"
+                   ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                   : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+               }&#96;}
+             &gt;
+               Leaderboard
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("outputs")}
+               className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors ${
+                 activeTab === "outputs"
+                   ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                   : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+               }&#96;}
+             &gt;
+               Outputs
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Leaderboard Tab */}
+           {activeTab === "leaderboard" &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+               {evaluationResult.leaderboard_metrics_path &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                   &lt;img
+                     src={evaluationResult.leaderboard_metrics_path}
+                     alt="Leaderboard metrics"
+                     className="w-full h-auto rounded-lg"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+               {evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary &amp;&amp; evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+                   &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                     &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                       &lt;tr&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Run&lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Count&lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;WER&lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;String Similarity&lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM Judge Score&lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;TTFB (s)&lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Processing Time (s)&lt;/th&gt;
+                       &lt;/tr&gt;
+                     &lt;/thead&gt;
+                     &lt;tbody&gt;
+                       {evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map((summary, index) =&gt; (
+                         &lt;tr key={index} className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.run}&lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.count}&lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.wer}&lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.string_similarity.toFixed(5)}&lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.llm_judge_score}&lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.ttfb.toFixed(5)}&lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{summary.processing_time.toFixed(5)}&lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                       ))}
+                     &lt;/tbody&gt;
+                   &lt;/table&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+ 
+           {/* Outputs Tab */}
+           {activeTab === "outputs" &amp;&amp; evaluationResult.provider_results &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+               {/* Provider Tabs */}
+               &lt;div className="flex gap-2 border-b border-border overflow-x-auto"&gt;
+                 {evaluationResult.provider_results.map((providerResult) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;button
+                     key={providerResult.provider}
+                     onClick={() =&gt; setActiveProviderTab(providerResult.provider)}
+                     className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
+                       activeProviderTab === providerResult.provider
+                         ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                         : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                     }&#96;}
+                   &gt;
+                     {providerResult.provider}
+                   &lt;/button&gt;
+                 ))}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Provider Content */}
+               {activeProviderTab &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;&gt;
+                   {evaluationResult.provider_results
+                     .filter((pr) =&gt; pr.provider === activeProviderTab)
+                     .map((providerResult) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;div key={providerResult.provider} className="space-y-6"&gt;
+                         {/* Overall Metrics */}
+                         &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                           &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;Overall Metrics&lt;/h3&gt;
+                           &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"&gt;
+                             &lt;div&gt;
+                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;WER&lt;/div&gt;
+                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;{providerResult.metrics.wer}&lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;div&gt;
+                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;Status&lt;/div&gt;
+                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                 {providerResult.success ? (
+                                   &lt;span className="text-green-500"&gt;Success&lt;/span&gt;
+                                 ) : (
+                                   &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;Failed&lt;/span&gt;
+                                 )}
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                           {providerResult.message &amp;&amp; (
+                             &lt;div className="mt-4 text-[13px] text-muted-foreground"&gt;{providerResult.message}&lt;/div&gt;
+                           )}
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                         {/* Results Table */}
+                         {providerResult.results &amp;&amp; providerResult.results.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                           &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+                             &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                               &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                                 &lt;tr&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;ID&lt;/th&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Ground Truth&lt;/th&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Prediction&lt;/th&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;WER&lt;/th&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;String Similarity&lt;/th&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM Judge Score&lt;/th&gt;
+                                   &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM Judge Reasoning&lt;/th&gt;
+                                 &lt;/tr&gt;
+                               &lt;/thead&gt;
+                               &lt;tbody&gt;
+                                 {providerResult.results.map((result, index) =&gt; (
+                                   &lt;tr key={index} className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{result.id}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{result.gt}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{result.pred}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{result.wer}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{parseFloat(result.string_similarity).toFixed(5)}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;{result.llm_judge_score}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                     &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-muted-foreground max-w-md"&gt;{result.llm_judge_reasoning}&lt;/td&gt;
+                                   &lt;/tr&gt;
+                                 ))}
+                               &lt;/tbody&gt;
+                             &lt;/table&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                         )}
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     ))}
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
  
        {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
```

## Summary of Changes:

1. **Added TypeScript types** for evaluation results, provider results, and leaderboard summary.

2. **Added state management**:
   - `isEvaluating`: Controls spinner visibility
   - `evaluationResult`: Stores the evaluation result
   - `activeTab`: Tracks "leaderboard" or "outputs"
   - `activeProviderTab`: Tracks the selected provider in outputs
   - `pollingIntervalRef`: Manages polling interval

3. **Updated `handleEvaluate` function**:
   - Shows spinner when clicked
   - Calls `/stt/evaluate` API
   - Starts polling `/stt/evaluate/{task_id}` every 2 seconds
   - Stops polling when status is "done"
   - Cleans up interval on unmount

4. **Added Results Display**:
   - **Leaderboard Tab**:
     - Displays image from `leaderboard_metrics_path`
     - Shows table with leaderboard summary data
   - **Outputs Tab**:
     - Provider tabs for each provider result
     - Overall metrics card (WER, Status, Message)
     - Results table with all row-level metrics

5. **UI improvements**:
   - Spinner replaces evaluate button during evaluation
   - Tab navigation for switching between views
   - Responsive tables with proper styling
   - Clean layout matching existing design

The component now handles the full evaluation flow: starts evaluation, polls for completion, and displays results in an organized tabbed interface.

Updated the component to automatically start polling with the hardcoded task ID on mount.

## Changes Made:

1. **Added a useEffect hook** that runs on component mount:
   - Sets `isEvaluating` to `true` (shows spinner)
   - Sets `evaluationResult` with the hardcoded task ID `"b28aab15-b2d4-49fc-ae46-b63af167b390"` and status `"in_progress"`
   - Sets the active tab to "leaderboard"
   - Starts polling immediately, then every 2 seconds
   - Cleans up the interval on unmount

2. **Positioned the useEffect** after the `pollTaskStatus` function so it can access it.

When the component loads:
- The spinner appears (evaluating state)
- Polling starts immediately with the hardcoded task ID
- When the task status becomes "done", polling stops and results are displayed in the tabs

The component will automatically poll `/stt/evaluate/b28aab15-b2d4-49fc-ae46-b63af167b390` and display results when ready.

Updated the metrics display to handle the new array structure.

## Changes Made:

1. **Updated TypeScript types**:
   - Created a `MetricItem` union type covering:
     - Simple metrics: `{wer: number}`, `{string_similarity: number}`, `{llm_judge_score: number}`
     - Complex metrics: `{metric_name, processor, mean, std, values}`
   - Changed `metrics` from an object to `MetricItem[]`

2. **Updated the metrics display**:
   - Iterates through the metrics array
   - Handles simple metrics (`wer`, `string_similarity`, `llm_judge_score`)
   - Handles complex metrics with `metric_name` (e.g., `ttfb`, `processing_time`) and displays the `mean` value
   - Formats display names (e.g., "TTFB (s)", "Processing Time (s)")
   - Keeps the Status field at the end

The metrics section now displays all metrics from the array in a 2-column grid, showing the appropriate values for each metric type.

```diff
-                                     ? "Processing Time (s)"
-                                     : metric.metric_name;
-                                 return (

-                             })}
-                           &lt;/div&gt;

-                                 &lt;span&gt;❌&lt;/span&gt;

+                         {/* Error Message */}
+                         {!providerResult.success &amp;&amp; providerResult.message &amp;&amp; (
+                           &lt;div className="text-[13px] text-red-500 flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                             &lt;span&gt;❌&lt;/span&gt;
+                             &lt;span&gt;{providerResult.message}&lt;/span&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                         )}
+ 
+                         {/* Overall Metrics - Only show if success */}
+                         {providerResult.success &amp;&amp; (
+                           &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                             &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;
+                               Overall Metrics
+                             &lt;/h3&gt;
+                             &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"&gt;
+                               {providerResult.metrics.map((metric, index) =&gt; {
+                                 // Handle simple metrics
+                                 if ("wer" in metric) {
+                                   return (
+                                     &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                         WER
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                         {metric.wer}
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                                   );
+                                 }
+                                 if ("string_similarity" in metric) {
+                                   return (
+                                     &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                         String Similarity
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                         {metric.string_similarity.toFixed(5)}
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                                   );
+                                 }
+                                 if ("llm_judge_score" in metric) {
+                                   return (
+                                     &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                         LLM Judge Score
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                         {metric.llm_judge_score}
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                                   );
+                                 }
+                                 // Handle complex metrics with metric_name
+                                 if ("metric_name" in metric) {
+                                   const displayName =
+                                     metric.metric_name === "ttfb"
+                                       ? "TTFB (s)"
+                                       : metric.metric_name === "processing_time"
+                                       ? "Processing Time (s)"
+                                       : metric.metric_name;
+                                   return (
+                                     &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                         {displayName}
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                       &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                         {metric.mean.toFixed(5)}
+                                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                                   );
+                                 }
+                                 return null;
+                               })}
+                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                         )}
  
                          {/* Results Table */}
```

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,220 @@
- 
+ # Design System &amp; Guidelines
+ 
+ ## General Principles
+ 
+ ### Cursor &amp; Interaction
+ - **All interactive elements** (buttons, tabs, select dropdowns, clickable items) must have &#96;cursor-pointer&#96; class
+ - Disabled elements should use &#96;cursor-not-allowed&#96; with &#96;disabled:opacity-50&#96;
+ - Hover states should be smooth with &#96;transition-colors&#96; or &#96;transition-opacity&#96;
+ 
+ ### Typography
+ - **Font sizes**: Use &#96;text-[13px]&#96; for most UI elements, &#96;text-[14px]&#96; for primary buttons, &#96;text-[15px]&#96; for headings/subheadings, &#96;text-[12px]&#96; for labels/secondary text, &#96;text-[18px]&#96; for large metric values
+ - **Font weights**: &#96;font-medium&#96; for most text, &#96;font-semibold&#96; for headings and primary buttons
+ - **Text colors**: Use semantic color tokens (&#96;text-foreground&#96;, &#96;text-muted-foreground&#96;, &#96;text-background&#96;)
+ 
+ ### Spacing
+ - Use consistent spacing scale: &#96;space-y-2&#96;, &#96;space-y-4&#96;, &#96;space-y-6&#96; for vertical spacing
+ - Padding: &#96;p-4&#96; for cards/containers, &#96;px-4 py-3&#96; for table cells, &#96;px-8&#96; for primary buttons
+ - Gaps: &#96;gap-2&#96;, &#96;gap-3&#96;, &#96;gap-4&#96; for flex/grid layouts
+ 
+ ## Component Patterns
+ 
+ ### Buttons
+ 
+ #### Primary Button
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="h-11 px-8 rounded-md text-[14px] font-semibold bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Height: &#96;h-11&#96;
+ - Padding: &#96;px-8&#96;
+ - Background: &#96;bg-foreground&#96; with &#96;text-background&#96;
+ - Hover: &#96;hover:opacity-90&#96;
+ 
+ #### Secondary Button
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-accent transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Height: &#96;h-10&#96;
+ - Border: &#96;border border-border&#96;
+ - Hover: &#96;hover:bg-accent&#96;
+ 
+ #### Icon Button
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-accent transition-colors flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Square: &#96;w-10 h-10&#96;
+ - Centered icon with flex
+ 
+ #### Dashed Border Button (Add/Secondary Actions)
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border border-dashed border-border bg-muted/20 hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground cursor-pointer"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### Tabs
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+   active ? "border-foreground text-foreground" : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+ }&#96;}
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Active: &#96;border-foreground text-foreground&#96;
+ - Inactive: &#96;border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground&#96;
+ - Always include &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;
+ 
+ ### Form Elements
+ 
+ #### Text Input
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="w-full h-10 px-3 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Height: &#96;h-10&#96;
+ - Focus: &#96;focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent&#96;
+ 
+ #### Select Dropdown
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none min-w-[140px]"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Custom dropdown arrow with absolute positioning
+ - &#96;appearance-none&#96; to hide default arrow
+ - &#96;cursor-pointer&#96; required
+ 
+ ### Cards &amp; Containers
+ 
+ #### Card Container
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Border radius: &#96;rounded-xl&#96;
+ - Background: &#96;bg-muted/10&#96; for subtle background
+ 
+ #### Table Container
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - &#96;overflow-hidden&#96; to clip table borders
+ 
+ ### Tables
+ 
+ #### Table Header
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Background: &#96;bg-muted/50&#96;
+ - Border: &#96;border-b border-border&#96;
+ 
+ #### Table Cell
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Padding: &#96;px-4 py-3&#96;
+ - Font size: &#96;text-[13px]&#96;
+ 
+ #### Table Row
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Border between rows, remove from last
+ 
+ ### Status Indicators
+ 
+ #### Success Icon
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="w-5 h-5 text-green-500"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ #### Error Message
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="text-[13px] text-red-500 flex items-center gap-2"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Include emoji (❌) for visual indication
+ 
+ #### Loading Spinner
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" // or w-5 h-5 for larger
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### Metrics Display
+ 
+ #### Metric Card Grid
+ - First row: &#96;grid grid-cols-3 gap-4&#96; (for 3 metrics)
+ - Second row: &#96;grid grid-cols-3 gap-4&#96; (maintain 3 columns even with 2 values)
+ - Metric label: &#96;text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1&#96;
+ - Metric value: &#96;text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground&#96;
+ 
+ ### Layout Patterns
+ 
+ #### Full Width Content Breakout
+ For content that needs to break out of parent container (&#96;max-w-4xl&#96;):
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="-mx-8 px-8 w-[calc(100vw-260px)] ml-[calc((260px-100vw)/2+50%)] relative"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Accounts for 260px sidebar
+ - Breaks out of parent padding with &#96;-mx-8 px-8&#96;
+ 
+ #### Section Spacing
+ - Use &#96;pt-6&#96; for sections after borders or major separations
+ - Use &#96;space-y-6&#96; for content within sections
+ 
+ ### Color Tokens
+ 
+ - &#96;foreground&#96; / &#96;background&#96;: Primary text/background colors
+ - &#96;muted-foreground&#96;: Secondary text
+ - &#96;border&#96;: Border color
+ - &#96;accent&#96;: Hover/active states
+ - &#96;muted&#96;: Subtle backgrounds (&#96;bg-muted/10&#96;, &#96;bg-muted/20&#96;, &#96;bg-muted/50&#96;)
+ 
+ ### Validation States
+ 
+ #### Invalid Row/Input
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="border-red-500 bg-red-500/10"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ - Red border with subtle red background
+ 
+ ### Dialogs/Modals
+ 
+ #### Overlay
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ #### Dialog Container
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl p-6 max-w-md w-full mx-4 shadow-lg"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## Specific Component Details
+ 
+ ### Evaluation Results Tabs
+ - Tabs should have &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;
+ - Content breaks out to full width (minus sidebar)
+ - Tab navigation aligned with Evaluate button padding
+ 
+ ### Provider Selection
+ - Toggle buttons with checkmark icons when selected
+ - Selected: &#96;bg-foreground text-background border-foreground&#96;
+ - Unselected: &#96;bg-background text-muted-foreground border-border hover:bg-accent/50&#96;
+ 
+ ### File Upload
+ - Hidden file input with custom button
+ - Loading state with spinner
+ - Success state with green checkmark icon
+ - File name truncation at 30 characters
+ 
+ ### Results Tables
+ - Row numbers (1, 2, 3...) instead of IDs in per-provider results
+ - Full width tables with proper column alignment
+ - Alternating row styling with borders
+ 
+ ## Accessibility
+ 
+ - All buttons should have appropriate &#96;aria-label&#96; when icon-only
+ - Focus states should be visible (&#96;focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent&#96;)
+ - Disabled states should be clearly indicated
+ 
+ ## Animation &amp; Transitions
+ 
+ - Use &#96;transition-colors&#96; for color changes
+ - Use &#96;transition-opacity&#96; for opacity changes
+ - Spinner animations: &#96;animate-spin&#96;
+ - Smooth scrolling: &#96;behavior: "smooth"&#96; for programmatic scrolling
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

**Leaderboard table:**
- WER: down arrow (higher is worse)

- LLM Judge Score: up arrow (higher is better)
- TTFB (s): down arrow (higher is worse)

- WER: down arrow (higher is worse)
- String Similarity: up arrow (higher is better)
- LLM Judge Score: up arrow (higher is better)

Arrows are small (`w-3 h-3`), muted, and aligned with the header text using flexbox. They indicate whether higher values are better or worse for each metric.

Added hover tooltips to all metric arrows. Hovering over an arrow shows:

**Leaderboard table:**
- WER: "Lower is better"
- String Similarity: "Higher is better"
- LLM Judge Score: "Higher is better"
- TTFB (s): "Lower is better"
- Processing Time (s): "Lower is better"

**Per-provider results table:**
- WER: "Lower is better"
- String Similarity: "Higher is better"
- LLM Judge Score: "Higher is better"

Each arrow is wrapped in a `<span>` with a `title` attribute so the browser shows a native tooltip on hover.

1. **Instant tooltips**: Replaced `title` attributes with CSS tooltips using `group-hover:opacity-100` that appear immediately on hover (no browser delay).

3. **Smaller font for per-provider table headers**: Changed all headers in the per-provider results table from `text-[13px]` to `text-[12px]`.

Tooltips now appear instantly on hover, the cursor changes to a pointer over the arrows, and the per-provider table headers use a smaller font size.

Fixed the tooltip visibility issue:

1. **Increased z-index**: Changed from `z-10` to `z-[100]` so tooltips appear above table elements.
2. **Adjusted overflow**: Changed the outer table container from `overflow-hidden` to `overflow-visible`, and added an inner wrapper with `overflow-hidden` to keep rounded corners while allowing tooltips to extend beyond the table.

Tooltips should now appear fully above the table headers when hovering over the arrows, without being clipped.
